title: [BUG] Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'F_OK')
author: LigiaAb
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

readFile gives `Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'F_OK')`

Lib version: ^4.3.0
Node JS: v14.18.2

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook();

const fullPath = path.resolve("excelName.xlsx");
await wb.xlsx.readFile(fullPath );


const buffer = await wb.xlsx.writeBuffer();

```
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/97065171/194883489-fd1ea6af-8c59-4491-9524-1cca1b099c57.png)

I already tried with the answers in #1168
